description: Create enemy data definitions and spawn tables for the 2 MVP factions. Enemy types are defined in a JSON data file specifying stats, behavior type, loot drops, and sector-specific spawn weights.
acceptance_criteria: An enemies.json data file defines all enemy types with fields: id, name, faction, hp, damage, speed, detectionRange, behaviorType (patrol/chase/guard), lootTable, spriteId.
Station Defense faction includes: maintenance bot (passive, 10 HP), patrol drone (ranged, 20 HP), security bot (ranged + cover-seeking, 35 HP), and turret (stationary, 50 HP).
Mutated Crew faction includes: shambler (slow melee, 15 HP), runner (fast melee, 10 HP), brute (heavy melee, 40 HP), and spitter (ranged acid, 20 HP).
Each sector has a spawn table defining which enemies appear and at what frequency, influenced by the Warden alert level.
Enemy loot tables specify item drop chances on death (e.g., 30% chance of ammo, 10% chance of repair kit).
All enemy definitions load from JSON and integrate with the AI system from STORY-0009.
notes: Spec: 'Station Defenses: Predictable, pattern-based. Hackable.' and 'Mutated Crew: Melee-focused, erratic movement.' 8 enemy types for MVP (spec says 8-10). Data-driven so adding more is easy.
